hero.title: Clarium brings financial order with a clean and direct experience.
hero.subtitle: A minimal Android app to organize income, expenses and routine with clear visuals and local-first privacy.

hero.mockupSubtitle: Balance, entries and categories with no visual clutter.

problem.title: Most finance apps overcomplicate what should be simple.
problem.description: Clarium removes dashboard overload and keeps the journey objective for people who just want to stay organized.
problemItems: Too many charts and panels that distract.
solutionItems: Personal finance organized in a few taps.

features.title: Everything that matters for personal finance control.
features.description: No empty claims: essential capabilities with premium polish and intuitive use.

items.title: Simplified income tracking
items.description: Register earnings quickly and keep a clean monthly view.

items.title: Expenses and recurrences
items.description: Track one-time and fixed costs with objective structure.

items.title: Custom categories
items.description: Shape your categories to match your real routine.

items.title: Light and dark themes
items.description: Visual comfort across contexts without contrast loss.

items.title: Multilingual
items.description: Experience available in pt-BR, English and Spanish.

items.title: Modern and intuitive visual language
items.description: Strong hierarchy to understand everything quickly.

items.title: Local-first and private
items.description: Data stays under user control with a privacy-first mindset.

items.title: Clarity and organization
items.description: Product design aimed at reducing friction and improving consistency.

build.title: Visual simplicity supported by solid engineering.
build.description: The implementation prioritizes real user experience, performance and long-term maintainability.

points.title: Product direction
points.description: Flows centered on day-to-day tasks, without dependency on complex dashboards.

points.title: Refined UX/UI
points.description: Readable typography, balanced rhythm and subtle micro-interactions to build trust.

points.title: Scalable architecture
points.description: Reusable components, true i18n and centralized config for future growth.

points.title: Performance and accessibility
points.description: Structure optimized for Core Web Vitals, keyboard navigation and low visual noise.

tech.title: Modern stack for speed, quality and continuous evolution.
tech.description: Technical choices focused on product stability, SEO and long-term maintenance.

items.title: Next.js App Router
items.description: Modern rendering, locale-segmented routes and SEO-friendly foundation.

items.title: TypeScript
items.description: Strong typing to reduce regressions and accelerate safe iteration.

items.title: Tailwind CSS
items.description: Consistent design system with fast and predictable implementation.

items.title: next-intl
items.description: Robust internationalization with real pt-BR, en and es support.

items.title: Technical SEO
items.description: Locale metadata, sitemap, robots, Open Graph and Twitter cards included.

items.title: Local-first privacy
items.description: Messaging and architecture aligned with local data control.

items.title: Modular architecture
items.description: Decoupled sections and centralized configuration for safer updates.

items.title: Multilingual experience
items.description: Language switching is functional across the main landing interface.

download.title: Download Clarium on Android and simplify your finance routine.

author.description: {name} leads product, design and implementation of Clarium, focused on clear financial organization for real users.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Quick answers about APK download, privacy and project evolution.

items.question: How do I download the APK?
items.answer: Use the main download button. Once the final environment variable is set, it points directly to the official APK link.

items.question: Does Clarium collect personal data?
items.answer: Clarium follows a local-first approach: prioritizing local control and minimizing unnecessary data exposure.

items.question: Which languages are available?
items.answer: The landing and app are prepared for pt-BR, English and Spanish, with functional language switching.

items.question: Will the project receive new features?
items.answer: Yes. The architecture is organized for continuous evolution without major refactors.

items.question: Is local usage secure?
items.answer: A local-first model reduces dependency on external services and keeps usage more direct for users.

items.question: How can I send feedback or support the project?
items.answer: You can reach out via GitHub/LinkedIn and optionally support via the Pix key shown on this page.

footer.description: Clarium is an independent project focused on financial organization without interface overload.
